title: TC4 wand crafting / sceptre table parity
implemented: Generated wand assembly recipes from original rod/cap combinations through WandCraftingRuntime
Generated sceptre assembly recipes using original charm/cap/rod grid
Preserved original root NBT strings rod/cap and byte sceptre on results
Preserved all-primal craftCost formulas for wands and sceptres
Kept original wood+iron basic wand exclusion
Added sceptre focus equip/cast restriction matching original focus-change guard
forge_1_19_2_adapters: ArcaneWorkbenchBlockEntity.slotForGrid maps original 3x3 container coordinates to Forge 1.19.2 block-entity slots
Generic iron_capped_wooden_wand registry item carries original rod/cap/sceptre NBT instead of using 1.7.10 item metadata
